_watchlist_note: Fallback only — at runtime the bot auto-fetches top 100 BingX USDT-perp by 24h volume
watchlist_source: AUTO: BingX /openApi/swap/v2/quote/ticker top-100 by quoteVolume, min $1M/day
watchlist_last_updated: auto — refreshed on boot and every midnight UTC

SMA30.purpose: Trend bias — MA20 vs SMA30 determines long/short direction

MA20_5m.purpose: MTF bias — 5m close vs 5m-MA20 must confirm 1m trend direction (trend entries only)

ATR14_5m.purpose: BTC volatility proxy for market regime detection

strategy_type: CONSOLIDATED HEDGE FUND AI SWING TRADER (single process)

candle_rules.sort_order: ascending by time (oldest first, newest last)
candle_rules.forming_bar: candles[-1] = FORMING bar — never used for signals
candle_rules.ma_input: MA20/SMA30 computed over closed bars only
candle_rules.htf_bars: 5m: 25 bars fetched, [-1] excluded as forming, [-2] is last closed 5m bar
candle_rules.high_low: high and low parsed from klines for ATR calculation

bias_filter.secondary: 5m close vs 5m MA20 (MTF — trend entries only)
bias_filter.neutral: MA20 == SMA30 OR 5m disagrees → skip trend entry
bias_filter.sma30_note: SMA30 replaces SMA200 — shorter-term bias, more responsive crossovers, candle fetch shrinks from 204→34 bars

entry.long: SWING LONG: GREEN + prev RED + close≥MA20 + within 0.5% + 1m-MA20>SMA30 + 5m-close≥5m-MA20 + RSI<70
entry.short: SWING SHORT: RED + prev GREEN + close≤MA20 + within 0.5% + 1m-MA20<SMA30 + 5m-close≤5m-MA20 + RSI>30

exit.stop_loss: -2% unrealized PnL — all positions (trend + reversal unified)
exit.take_profit: REMOVED in v4.0 — no fixed target, trail rides winners to maximum
exit.trailing_stop: activates at +2%, trails 2% below peak — locks in profit every +2% gain
exit.ma20_crossover: REMOVED in v3.9 — caused premature exits at < -1% PnL before stop-loss fired

hf_agent.description: Hedge Fund AI Agent — multi-layer analysis, regime-aware sizing, correlation control

market_regime.update_freq: every 5 minutes + on boot + on daily reset

detection.VOLATILE: ATR(14) / price > 0.3% per 5m bar → reduce all sizes to 50%
detection.BULL_TREND: MA20 slope > +0.05% over 5 bars → LONG=100%, SHORT=75%
detection.BEAR_TREND: MA20 slope < -0.05% over 5 bars → SHORT=100%, LONG=75%
detection.RANGING: slope flat, ATR normal → all entries at 75%

correlation_control.description: Max 5 major-coin positions open simultaneously — prevents over-exposure to BTC-correlated assets

smart_reentry.description: 5-min per-symbol block after stop-loss fires — prevents revenge trades on same failed setup

portfolio_heat.description: Total open margin / (available balance + open margin) × 100 — logged on every scan
portfolio_heat.purpose: Real-time exposure visibility to prevent over-leveraging

volume_filter.note: Volume used for reversal detection only

limits.description: Max 20 open | 500/day | stop:-2%(all) no-TP trail:+2%→2% | rev-vol:1×avg | corr-cap:5 majors | cooldown:5min

reversal_entry.long_in_short_bias: 1m MA20<SMA30 + GREEN + prev RED + close≥MA20 ±0.5% + RSI<70 + vol≥1× avg → LONG reversal
reversal_entry.short_in_long_bias: 1m MA20>SMA30 + RED + prev GREEN + close≤MA20 ±0.5% + RSI>30 + vol≥1× avg → SHORT reversal
reversal_entry.volume_baseline: 20-bar avg over prior closed bars (forming bar AND curr bar excluded)
reversal_entry.note: 50% base size × regime multiplier. Stop unified at -2%. Vol bar: any candle with vol ≥ 20-bar avg qualifies.

risk_management.description: No fixed TP | Trail activates +2%, trails 2% below peak | Stop -2% ALL | 5-min cooldown | Daily $200 target (tracking only) | 24/7 | Circuit breaker WR<40% → pause 30min

deployment.process: bot.js — Consolidated Hedge Fund AI Swing Trader

performance.exit_poll_passes: 2-pass: Pass1=stop/TP/trail (no extra API), Pass2=parallel MA20 fetch
performance.livePrice_calls: on-demand only when exit condition fires

profitability_tracking.daily_pnl: Realized P&L per trade + daily total
profitability_tracking.display_format: icon EXIT SIDE SYMBOL [reason] price:X% margin:Y% | PnL:$Z | Daily:$D | W/L:N/M(R%)

debug.log_level: critical events: entries, exits, stops, TPs, trails, cooldowns, regime changes, scan summaries

changelog.v4.1: Exchange-side STOP_MARKET order placed on BingX immediately after every entry — eliminates 5-second polling delay for stop-loss, ensures exact -2% execution. cancelExchangeStop() called before any trail exit to prevent double-close. Stale-state cleanup in pollExits detects positions BingX closed via exchange stop and frees slots + sets cooldown. Poll interval 5s→2s for faster trail detection. Software stop kept as fallback.
changelog.v4.0: Removed fixed take-profit (+8%). Trail activates at +2% (was +4%) — locks in profit every +2% gain and rides winners to maximum. Stop-loss tightened -3%→-2% for all positions (trend + reversal). Exit order: stop-loss → trailing-stop only.
changelog.v3.9: MA20 crossover exit removed entirely. Exits are now stop-loss (-3%) → take-profit (+8%) → trailing-stop (+4%/−2%) only. Eliminates premature closes at < -1% PnL. pollExits simplified from 2-pass to single-pass; checkExit function removed.
changelog.v3.8: Trend indicator changed: SMA200 → SMA30. MA20 vs SMA30 now determines long/short bias (shorter-term, more responsive crossovers). Candle fetch limit drops from 204 to 34 (faster API). trendGap threshold adjusted 0.5%→0.2% to reflect MA20/SMA30 proximity.
changelog.v3.7: HF AI Edition: auto-watchlist top-100 BingX USDT-perp (boot+midnight refresh), market regime detection (BTC 5m ATR+slope → BULL/BEAR/RANGING/VOLATILE), regime-based sizing, major-coin correlation cap (max 5), portfolio heat logging, 10 scan workers, ATR function, high/low in candles. Bundles v3.6.
changelog.v3.6: Reversal vol 2×→1× (any vol≥avg qualifies), reversal stop -1.5%→-3% (unified with trend)
changelog.v3.5: Scalper→Swing Trader: 5m MTF, TP+8%, trail+4%, 5-min cooldown, scoring max 10pts
changelog.v3.3: volAvg fix, parallel 5-worker fetch, 2-pass pollExits, livePrice on-demand, getCandles retry
changelog.v3.2: Counter-trend reversal entries with volume gating
changelog.v3.1: 8-bug fix: qty precision, double-exit guard, PnL methods, TDZ, daily resets
changelog.v3.0: TP+6%, trailing stop, circuit breaker, RSI, signal scoring
